_doc: WordPress category ID ↔ slug mapping. Updated whenever a category is created or renamed via MCP. Frontmatter in content/*.md files references categories by slug; the push tooling resolves slug → ID using this file.

categories.name: Product Overview
categories.description: Overview pages for Essential Elements Interactive features and the broader product family.

categories.name: Features
categories.description: Individual EEi feature pages: Music Studio, SoundCheck, Video Assignments, Google Classroom, and others.

categories.name: Method Books
categories.description: Essential Elements method book pages — band and strings, books 1–3.

categories.name: Account Setup
categories.description: How to create teacher and student EEi accounts, school codes, invite links, and account migration.

categories.name: Tutorials
categories.description: Step-by-step how-to guides for using EEi: submitting recordings, video assignments, and other workflows.

categories.name: Teaching Tips
categories.description: Long-form articles for music educators teaching with Essential Elements: classroom management, rehearsal routines, instrument-specific tips, and pedagogy.

categories.name: Webinars
categories.description: On-demand and live webinars for music educators using Essential Elements Interactive.

categories.name: News
categories.description: EEi news, product updates, announcements, and blog posts.

categories.name: Lead Generation
categories.description: Lead-gen forms and gated content: book preview requests/downloads, code purchase requests. All set to noindex.

categories.name: Archive
categories.description: Historical content kept for the record. All posts in this category are noindex and excluded from main navigation.

categories.name: Giveaways
categories.description: Past giveaways and promotional campaigns. Mostly archived (noindex), kept as historical record.

categories.name: null - null
categories.description: Junk category from migration. To be deleted.
